title: US EV Charging Networks: How the 7 Biggest Got Their Starts
text: Charged EVs article on US EV Charging Networks including ChargePoint. ChargePoint operates the largest EV public charging network in the U.S. with 56,000 ports across 31,000 locations. The company has grown from its founding to become a major player in the EV charging infrastructure space, competing with Tesla, Blink Charging, and other providers. ChargePoint's network includes both Level 2 and DC fast charging capabilities across residential, commercial, and fleet segments.
